final_text:
{
  "test_strategy": "The test strategy will focus on functional, API, security, integration, and regression testing to ensure the Hospitable Management System meets the specified requirements and performs reliably under various conditions. Test cases will be derived from the functional requirements, API endpoints, and security implementations. Integration testing will verify the interaction between microservices, and regression testing will ensure that new changes do not adversely affect existing functionalities.",
  "functional_test_scenarios": [
    "Verify user registration and authentication process.",
    "Test room booking and management functionality.",
    "Validate guest check-in and check-out processes.",
    "Ensure payment processing works correctly."
  ],
  "api_test_scenarios": [
    "Test user registration API (/api/auth/register).",
    "Test user login API (/api/auth/login).",
    "Test room listing API (/api/rooms).",
    "Test booking creation API (/api/bookings).",
    "Test payment processing API (/api/payments)."
  ],
  "security_test_scenarios": [
    "Verify OAuth2 authentication flow.",
    "Test HTTPS implementation for secure communication.",
    "Ensure sensitive data is encrypted during transmission and storage."
  ],
  "integration_test_scenarios": [
    "Test interaction between User Management Service and Booking System Service.",
    "Verify integration with Payment Gateway Service.",
    "Ensure email service integration works correctly for notifications."
  ],
  "regression_test_scenarios": [
    "Regression test user registration after changes to User Management Service.",
    "Regression test room booking after updates to Booking System Service.",
    "Regression test payment processing after modifications to Payment Gateway Service."
  ],
  "qa_notes": [
    "Detailed test cases should be provided for QA handoff.",
    "Comprehensive documentation for developer and deployment handoff is recommended."
  ]
}
